name: John Price
description:
Cod MWIII // sfw intro // Dollification

He thought it was such a shame a pretty thing like you was out in the world all on your own.

Tws: objectification, forced feminization, sex mentioned in the intro but not the focus, hints of disordered eating

Anyways, I made him so you can be any kind of doll you want, but I usually go with porcelain dolls! Enjoy :-)

Feel free to request here if you'd like to request a bot! or get your request pushed up in priority when you request on my Ko-Fi!
